violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Food items in freezer were exposed to ice build up.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment did not meet proper design and/or construction characteristics. -Microwave has wear to make uncleanable surfaces inside machine.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Build up on walls and ceilings from fryer use.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. -Out of soap at time of inspection--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Out of paper towels at time of inspection
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
